description: This file defines the 'User' entity class for managing user data in a database, including fields like id, name, email, role, active status, createdAt, and updatedAt, along with relevant annotations for persistence and validation.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Entity class representing application users, with fields for user attributes and lifecycle hooks for timestamp management.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Updates the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is persisted or updated.
